name: Noobs: Crazy Combo
description: Noobs: Crazy Combo is a fast-paced ragdoll arcade action built for short, addictive sessions. Swing your hammer to send noobs flying and chain cascading combos to rack up huge scores.
instructions: Desktop Space Start Combo Mobile Tap to screen Start Combo Every time a noob hits a surface your combo counter increases Collect gold from combos to buy upgrades and gadgets place traps to create cascades
